reviews.comment:
Lento para atender... y que no te agarre cambio de turno... sino te tenés que ir al casino que está enfrente y jugate unas fichas

(Translated by Google)
Slow service... and don't let the shift change get to you... otherwise you'll have to go to the casino across the street and gamble some chips.

reviews.comment:
